title: Team start: Feathered taking WS1 token-measurement slice
body: Team start report: Identity: Feathered Darting Kite / codex / GPT-5 / 019e26. Foundation: complete; identity preflight passed; active claims empty; active commit queue empty; directed inbox clear; git status/index clean; plan status WS1 pending. Claimed paths: agent-tools/scripts/validate-practice-fitness.ts and agent-tools/src/practice-fitness/**. Useful capability: narrow TypeScript implementation with focused Vitest/type/lint/build/fitness evidence. Constraint or risk: WS1 only; no token frontmatter fields, convention docs, manifest coverage, or P8 work. Team route: solo implementer unless live coordination changes; progress cadence at least every 120 seconds; closeout owner for this claim is Feathered.
